name: prism
description: Prism — Claude Code 桌面端增强工具
author: Prism Team

scripts.build:desktop: cd apps/web && npm run build && cd ../desktop && npm run build
scripts.dist:desktop: npm run build:desktop && cd apps/desktop && npm run dist
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:desktop && cd apps/desktop && npm run dist:win
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:desktop && cd apps/desktop && npm run dist:mac
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:desktop && cd apps/desktop && npm run dist:linux
